title: AuraEssentials
description: The best all-in-one plugin: clans, economy, NPCs, TPA, homes, ranks, Bedrock GUI, Discord, extensions API and much more.
body:
# AuraEssentials ![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/ewrf0pon?style=flat-square&logo=modrinth&label=Modrinth&color=00AF5C) ![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-All%20Rights%20Reserved-FF8A3D?style=flat-square) ![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1284212577420705824?style=flat-square&logo=discord&label=Discord&color=5865F2) ![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.9%2B-5E9C3F?style=flat-square) ![Paper](https://img.shields.io/badge/Paper-Supported-8A8A8A?style=flat-square) ![Purpur](https://img.shields.io/badge/Purpur-Supported-A855F7?style=flat-square) ![Pufferfish](https://img.shields.io/badge/Pufferfish-Supported-3B82F6?style=flat-square) Login, Fast Login, Anti Multi-Account, Clans, Economy, Shop, VIP, Starter Kit, Missions, Pix / Pay, TPA, Homes, Warps, RTP, Back, Duels, PvP Mode, Combat Log, NPCs, Holograms, Scoreboard, AutoPickup, Vanish, Ender Chest View, Inventory Inspect, ClearLag, Claims, Protection Areas Admin, Bedrock Forms, Skins, Extensions, Nametag Custom Ranks Glyph, Placeholds, Border, Portable Crafting, Portable Anvil, Discord Bridge. ## Trailer English - [Portuguese Video]([https://modrinth.com/plugin/geyser](https://youtu.be/bJZSKQXb-bk?si=VDrr3N7d5spG1Z2Y)) ## Highlights **Player:** Clans, Homes, Warps, TPA, RTP, Spawn++ **Economy:** Shop, Auctions, VIP Kits, Daily Login, Rank rewards **Protection:** Land claiming, Protected areas, anti-grief, admin tools **Gameplay:** Skins Support, Bedrock UI, 1v1 duel, PvP manager, scoreboard **Admin:** Reports, punishments, anti-cheat checks, configuration tools
Compatibility - Minecraft Java Edition `1.21.9+` - Confirmed support for `1.21.10 --> 26.1.2` - Compatible with the `26.1.x` line on supported server builds
Optional Integrations - [Geyser](https://modrinth.com/plugin/geyser) - [Floodgate](https://geysermc.org/download/?project=floodgate) - [Discord Token Bot](https://discord.com/developers/applications) - [AuraClient](https://rochaproject.qzz.io/#downloads)
AuraClient (Optional) AuraClient is completely optional. AuraEssentials works normally without it using commands, native Minecraft interfaces, organized fallback menus and Bedrock Forms for Geyser/Floodgate players. Once installed, AuraClient provides stunning visuals and instant logins.
Download --> [Official AuraClient](https://rochaproject.qzz.io/#downloads) ![Review](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/653ce8342c9aefd7f09644de277e8ae94b6ba494_0.webp) ## Why AuraEssentials? AuraEssentials was built to become a complete, modern and performance-focused ecosystem for Java servers, with the goal of standing among the leading plugins in the community.
